meaning: adj.该诅咒的,固执的,乖僻的
examples: No, Tom, I won't be rich, and I won't live in them cussed smothery houses.
The coach cussed out the team for losing.
One difficulty they face is the cussed tendency of biological things to evolve.
It is also about those curious, unpredictable, inventive and cussed creatures: human beings.
Roy, the prettiest of all of them, leaned against the car for balance, and cussed his older brother a little more.
